content.text: Can we make this less likely to ask follow-up questions and continue automatically when the next step is obvious?

payload.name: request_user_input
payload.arguments: {"questions":[{"header":"Implementation lane","question":"Which implementation lane should we take first?","options":[{"label":"Implement the tri-state flow","description":"Add end, auto-continue, and ask-user as explicit stop outcomes."},{"label":"Tighten ask-user threshold only","description":"Keep the boolean schema and only ask for user input less often."},{"label":"Stop here","description":"Leave the current hook behavior as-is."}]}]}

content.text: The follow-up question logic should probably move to a tri-state decision.
